name: @firstpick/pi-skill-architecture-review
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill for architecture reviews, module boundaries, dependency direction, coupling/cohesion, SOLID concerns, system design trade-offs, layering, service boundaries, or design decisions before implementation.
description_zh: 代理应在架构审查、模块边界、依赖方向、耦合/内聚、SOLID 关注点、系统设计权衡、分层、服务边界或实现前设计决策时调用此技能。
